title: Backend Logic - Encounter Service
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-032' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-032' to ingest requirements
Create/Update Test File for logic business logic
Implement core business logic/services in `backend/app/` for logic
Run Pytest to verify logic behaves as defined in the Logical Component
definition_of_done: Logic accurately reflects the constraints of logic
